note: Explorer cosmetic update. (1) BLOCK HEIGHT card sub-line split into two: '21,245 UTXOs ·' on the first line and 'next: pre-Phase 2 / NORMAL / LOTTERY' on a second line in yellow (var(--yellow) #fbbf24, weight 600), so the next-block schedule label is always visually distinct from the UTXO count. (2) MINING BLOCK panel 'lottery: ...' line now renders in magenta (#ff00ff) regardless of state — pre-Phase-2, NORMAL or LOTTERY — so the lottery indicator line always stands out from the rest of the mining diagnostics. No content/logic changes; same schedule rules (2-of-3 between 7100..12099, 1-of-3 from 12100). Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
